title: Professional Relationships, Community Participation, and Consent · Hiring Decision Lens: Relationship Integrity
summary: A learner treats networking as mass cold requests for referrals, extracts attention, ignores community norms, and measures people only by hiring power. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the relationship integrity increment in reciprocal relationship practice plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Refuse deceptive familiarity, hidden automation, testimonial fabrication, referral pressure, or contact harvesting.
Record promised action, consented channel, timing, privacy boundary, thanks, and a respectful stop rule.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Relationship Integrity · Theory Relationship Integrity
steps.instruction:
theory case — Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Relationship Integrity contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Relationship Integrity · Theory Relationship Integrity.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for refuse deceptive familiarity, hidden automation, testimonial fabrication, referral pressure, or contact harvesting. For Predict Relationship Integrity · Theory Relationship Integrity, keep Relationship Integrity connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Refuse deceptive familiarity, hidden automation, testimonial fabrication, referral pressure, or contact harvesting. A defensible solution applies Relationship Integrity, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to reciprocal relationship practice plan.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-relationship-integrity — Refuse deceptive familiarity, hidden automation, testimonial fabrication, referral pressure, or contact harvesting.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
focus: career-relationship-integrity
decision-evidence: Refuse deceptive familiarity, hidden automation, testimonial fabrication, referral pressure, or contact harvesting.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
